src/main/java/no/rutebanken/extime/App.j.general_idea: Add explicit import for GooglePubSubConfig to maintain configuration wiring.
Add explicit import for SpringApplicationBuilder to support new main method.
Add explicit import for Import annotation to support new class annotation.
Add @Import annotation to explicitly include GooglePubSubConfig.

src/main/java/no/rutebanken/extime/route.general_idea: Replace hardcoded error handling configuration with Spring-managed properties for redelivery settings.
Switch from DeadLetterChannel to DefaultErrorHandler to align with modern Camel error handling patterns.
Add custom logging callback for redelivery attempts to improve observability.
Enable exponential backoff and stack trace logging in the error handler.
Remove specific exception handler for ConnectException, relying on the global default error handler instead.
Add interceptor to propagate Google Pub/Sub message attributes to Camel headers on consumption.
Add interceptor to map Camel headers to Google Pub/Sub attributes on production, enforcing size limits.
Add new imports for Java 17 compatible libraries and Camel components.
src/main/java/no/rutebanken/extime/route.why_exists: New code uses classes like StandardCharsets, Path, Files, UUID, and various Camel/Avior models that were not present in the old file.

src/main/java/no/rutebanken/extime/route.general_idea: Implement new route logic for fetching and converting Avinor timetables.
src/main/java/no/rutebanken/extime/route.why_exists: The old simple validation pipeline is replaced by a complex multi-step route involving fetching, splitting, converting to NeTEx, and uploading to storage.
src/main/java/no/rutebanken/extime/route.before:
from("direct:validate1")
                .log("Validation 1 will be done at this point.");
src/main/java/no/rutebanken/extime/route.after:
from("direct:fetchFlights")
                .routeId("FetchFlights")
                .log(LoggingLevel.INFO, this.getClass().getName(), "Fetching data from feed")
                .process(new AirportIataProcessor()).id("TimetableAirportIATAProcessor")
                .bean(DateUtils.class, "generateDateRanges").id("TimetableDateRangeProcessor")
                .split(body(), new ScheduledFlightListAggregationStrategy()).parallelProcessing()

src/main/java/no/rutebanken/extime/route.general_idea: Add inner classes for Camel AggregationStrategy and Processor.
src/main/java/no/rutebanken/extime/route.why_exists: New route logic requires custom aggregation strategies and processors defined as inner classes.
